label: plane angle
notes: Dimensionless in the SI (rad = m/m). The zero vector is the collision class of ALL dimensionless quantity kinds; cosine is undefined at the zero vector, so the dimension lane is L2-tagged, never cosine (sparq metric-tag discipline).
bridgeStatus: asserted-unverified: QUDT IRIs asserted from documentation knowledge, not yet verified by dereference (follow-up bead); the qudtDimensionVector local name is mechanically derived from dim and cross-checked by validate.mjs
